capabilities.name: Evaluation Lab
capabilities.purpose: Score use cases and agents for value, suitability, data readiness, governance, safety, HITL, operational readiness, and open architecture fit.

capabilities.name: Governance Workflow Engine
capabilities.purpose: Run intake, suitability, data readiness, governance, evaluation, approval, pilot, and production gates.

capabilities.name: Agent Registry + Evidence Vault
capabilities.purpose: Track agents, versions, owners, lifecycle status, and evidence artifacts.

capabilities.name: Policy-as-Code Guardrails
capabilities.purpose: Deterministically allow, control, require approval, or deny risky agent actions.

capabilities.name: Runtime Enforcement Hooks
capabilities.purpose: Bind policy checks to provider/model execution flow using provider-neutral mock adapters.

capabilities.name: Observability, Cost, and Trace Ledger
capabilities.purpose: Capture execution and blocked-action traces, cost estimates, and agent-level runtime reports.

capabilities.name: Connector and Tool Sandbox
capabilities.purpose: Evaluate and simulate enterprise tool execution without live side effects.

capabilities.name: Procurement Agent Accelerator
capabilities.purpose: Demonstrate the full control-plane lifecycle using PO, invoice, challan, vendor, and exception-review flows.

capabilities.name: Security, RBAC, and Tenant Readiness
capabilities.purpose: Check role, tenant, capability, environment, autonomy, and risk-ceiling boundaries.

capabilities.name: Tenant-Scoped Storage
capabilities.purpose: Provide tenant-scoped local JSON storage as a migration-ready persistence boundary.

capabilities.name: Audit Event Bus and Decision History
capabilities.purpose: Normalize governance, policy, runtime, tool, security, storage, approval, provider, and safety events into one audit backbone.

capabilities.name: Approval Workflow
capabilities.purpose: Manage human approval requests, reviewer decisions, evidence linkage, and audit events.

capabilities.name: OIDC/IAM Simulation and Secrets Boundary
capabilities.purpose: Model identity providers, service identities, secret references, deny-by-default secret access, and no-raw-secret policy.

capabilities.name: Connector Contract SDK and Dry-Run Adapters
capabilities.purpose: Define connector contracts with identity, secret, approval, schema, side-effect, and dry-run behavior.

capabilities.name: Live Connector Governance Pack
capabilities.purpose: Evaluate whether a dry-run connector can become live-candidate-ready without enabling live execution.

capabilities.name: Provider Gateway Governance
capabilities.purpose: Govern model/provider route decisions by sensitivity, region, environment, capabilities, fallback, cost, approval, and evidence.

capabilities.name: Model Risk and Prompt/Response Safety
capabilities.purpose: Review prompt/response interactions against model risk profiles before future live provider execution.

capabilities.name: Control Plane Stabilization
capabilities.purpose: Unify navigation, demo flow, API surface, release status, and public narrative for a stable v2.0 release.

capabilities.name: Documentation Pruning, OpenAPI Polish, and Contributor Readiness
capabilities.purpose: Improve public adoption through curated docs, API catalog, repo validation, and contributor workflow.
